name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Direct income support of Rs. 6000 per year to all small and marginal farmers having cultivable land up to 2 hectares.
benefits: Rs. 6000 per year in 3 equal installments of Rs. 2000 directly credited to bank account
documents_required: Aadhaar card, Land records (Khatauni/Patta), Bank passbook, Mobile number
target_beneficiaries: Small and marginal farmers

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage due to unforeseen events like natural calamities, pests and diseases.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss; Premium subsidized by government (2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial crops)
benefit_amount: Varies by crop and state notified sum insured
documents_required: Aadhaar card, Land records, Bank account, Sowing certificate
target_beneficiaries: All farmers growing notified crops

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Short-term credit to farmers for their cultivation needs, post-harvest expenses, and maintenance of farm assets at subsidized interest rates.
benefits: Credit up to Rs. 3 lakh at 4% interest rate (after interest subvention); Personal accident insurance of Rs. 50,000
documents_required: Aadhaar card, PAN card, Land records, Passport-size photo, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Farmers, fishers, animal husbandry workers

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Soil testing and providing soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers for individual farms to improve soil health.
benefits: Free soil health card every 2 years with nutrient status and recommendations; Improved crop yield
documents_required: Aadhaar card, Land records
target_beneficiaries: All farmers

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti / Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare
description: Converge investments in irrigation, expand cultivable area under assured irrigation, improve on-farm water use efficiency to reduce water wastage.
benefits: Subsidy of 55% for small/marginal farmers and 45% for other farmers on micro-irrigation equipment; Improved water access
benefit_amount: 55% subsidy on drip/sprinkler systems for small/marginal farmers
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land ownership documents, Bank account, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Farmers (priority to small/marginal)

name: Electronic National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
description: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities allowing farmers to sell directly to buyers across the country getting better prices.
benefits: Access to larger markets; Better price discovery; Reduced middlemen; Online payment directly to bank
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account, Mobile number, Land/produce documents
target_beneficiaries: Farmers and traders

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotion of organic farming through cluster approach; financial assistance for organic certification and marketing.
benefits: Rs. 50,000 per hectare for 3 years; Rs. 31,000 for on-farm input production and organic management; Rs. 8,800 for value addition and marketing
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land records, Group formation certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Farmers forming clusters of 50 for organic farming

name: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers ensuring minimum pension after age 60.
benefits: Minimum assured pension of Rs. 3000 per month after age 60; Family pension of Rs. 1500 per month for spouse on farmer's death
documents_required: Aadhaar, IFSC code, Bank account, Land records
target_beneficiaries: Small/marginal farmers aged 18-40

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY) — Urban
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Housing for All by 2022 mission providing affordable housing to urban poor including EWS, LIG and MIG categories through credit linked subsidy, in-situ slum redevelopment and beneficiary-led construction.
benefits: Credit Linked Subsidy up to Rs. 2.67 lakh for EWS/LIG; Rs. 2.35 lakh for MIG-I; Rs. 2.30 lakh for MIG-II; Central assistance of Rs. 1.5 lakh for BLC
income_limit_display: EWS: Up to Rs. 3 lakh/year; LIG: Rs. 3-6 lakh; MIG-I: Rs. 6-12 lakh; MIG-II: Rs. 12-18 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN card, Income certificate, Address proof, Bank account, Property documents (if applicable), Caste certificate (if SC/ST)
target_beneficiaries: Urban poor, EWS/LIG/MIG households without pucca house

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana — Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Providing housing assistance to the rural poor for constructing pucca houses with basic amenities.
benefits: Rs. 1.20 lakh in plain areas; Rs. 1.30 lakh in hilly/NE/IAP districts; MGNREGS wages of 90-95 days; Toilet assistance of Rs. 12,000
documents_required: Aadhaar, BPL card/SECC data, Bank account, Job card (MGNREGS), Land ownership proof
target_beneficiaries: Houseless rural poor; SECC 2011 listed households

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) — Ayushman Bharat
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Largest government-funded health insurance scheme providing health cover of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
benefits: Health cover of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for 1,929 medical procedures at empanelled hospitals; Cashless and paperless access
documents_required: Aadhaar card, Ration card, SECC/BPL certificate
target_beneficiaries: Bottom 40% of India's population (~10.74 crore families)

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Safe motherhood intervention promoting institutional delivery among poor pregnant women to reduce maternal and neonatal mortality.
benefits: Cash incentive: Rs. 1400 (rural) / Rs. 1000 (urban) in LPS states; Rs. 700 (rural) / Rs. 600 (urban) in HPS states; Free delivery at government health centres
income_limit_display: BPL preferred; All eligible in LPS states
documents_required: Aadhaar, JSY card (from ASHA/ANM), Bank account, BPL card (if HPS state)
target_beneficiaries: Pregnant women (BPL) preferring institutional delivery

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Maternity benefit programme providing cash incentives to pregnant women and lactating mothers to compensate for wage loss and improve health and nutrition.
benefits: Rs. 5000 in 3 installments for first live birth (Rs. 1000 + Rs. 2000 + Rs. 2000); Rs. 6000 for second birth if girl child
benefit_amount: 5000 for first child; 6000 for second (girl child)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account, MCP card (from ANM), Proof of pregnancy
target_beneficiaries: Pregnant women and lactating mothers (first live birth)

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover at premium of Rs. 20 per year.
benefits: Rs. 2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability; Rs. 1 lakh for partial permanent disability
benefit_amount: 200000 for death/total disability; 100000 for partial disability
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account (savings)
target_beneficiaries: Bank account holders aged 18-70

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance scheme providing coverage for death due to any reason at an annual premium of Rs. 436.
benefits: Rs. 2 lakh life insurance cover for death due to any cause
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account (savings)
target_beneficiaries: Bank account holders aged 18-50

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY)
description: Health insurance for BPL families and unorganised sector workers providing cashless hospitalisation.
benefits: Cashless hospitalisation up to Rs. 30,000 per family per year; Coverage for up to 5 family members; Smart card issued
documents_required: BPL card, Aadhaar, Bank account, Ration card
deadline: Superseded by PM-JAY in most states
target_beneficiaries: BPL families and unorganised workers

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
name_hindi: अनुसूचित जाति छात्रों के लिए पोस्ट मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Financial assistance to SC students studying at post-matriculation level (class 11 and above) to enable them to complete their education.
benefits: Maintenance allowance: Rs. 380–1200/month; Reader charges for blind; Study tour; Thesis typing; Book allowance for professional courses
income_limit_display: Annual parental income up to Rs. 2.5 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, Caste certificate (SC), Income certificate, Last exam marksheet, Bonafide student certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC students in post-matric education

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
name_hindi: अन्य पिछड़ा वर्ग छात्रों के लिए पोस्ट मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Financial assistance to OBC students studying at post-matriculation level to enable them to complete their education.
benefits: Rs. 300–1000/month maintenance allowance; Study material charges; Hostel charges support
income_limit_display: Annual parental income up to Rs. 1 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, OBC certificate, Income certificate, Marksheet, Bonafide certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: OBC students in post-matric education

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students (Class 9-10)
name_hindi: अनुसूचित जाति छात्रों के लिए प्री मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship to SC students studying in class 9 and 10 to prevent dropout and encourage continuation of education.
benefits: Day scholars: Rs. 150/month (class 9-10); Hostellers: Rs. 350/month; Books/stationery: Rs. 750/year
benefit_amount: 150 per month day scholar; 350 per month hosteller
income_limit_display: Annual parental income up to Rs. 2.5 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, SC caste certificate, Income certificate, School enrollment certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC students in class 9-10

name: Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarship for Minorities
name_hindi: अल्पसंख्यकों के लिए प्री और पोस्ट मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
description: Scholarship for students from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Parsi, Jain) to provide equal opportunity in education.
benefits: Pre-matric: Rs. 100-600/month; Post-matric: Rs. 235-1235/month; Merit-cum-means: Up to Rs. 20,000/year
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 2 lakh (pre/post matric); Rs. 2.5 lakh (merit-cum-means)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Minority community certificate, Income certificate, Marksheet, Bonafide student certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Students from 6 notified minority communities

name: PM Research Fellowship (PMRF)
description: Fellowship to attract brilliant students with aptitude for research to pursue PhD program at IITs/IISc/NITs.
benefits: Fellowship of Rs. 70,000/month in first 2 years; Rs. 75,000/month in 3rd year; Rs. 80,000/month in 4th-5th year; Research grant of Rs. 2 lakh/year
education_requirement: B.Tech/Integrated M.Tech or B.Sc/M.Sc from IIT/IISc/NIT/IISER with CGPA >= 8.0
documents_required: Aadhaar, Degree certificate, CGPA marksheet, Research proposal, Recommendation letters
target_beneficiaries: Meritorious students pursuing PhD at IITs/IISc/NITs/IISERs

name: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal Scheme)
description: Cooked hot meal provided to students of class 1-8 in government and government-aided schools to improve nutrition and school attendance.
benefits: Free nutritious cooked mid-day meal; Calories: 450-700 kcal; Protein: 12-20g per day based on class
income_limit_display: No income limit (available to all enrolled students)
education_requirement: Enrolled in class 1-8 in government/aided school
documents_required: School enrollment
target_beneficiaries: Government school students class 1-8

name: Top Class Education for SC Students
name_hindi: अनुसूचित जाति के छात्रों के लिए शीर्ष श्रेणी शिक्षा
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Full financial support for SC students pursuing professional/technical education at top institutions including IITs, IIMs, NLUs, AIIMS.
benefits: Full tuition fee; Living expenses of Rs. 2220/month; Books/stationery: Rs. 3000/year; Computer allowance
benefit_amount: Full tuition + 2220 per month living expenses
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 6 lakh
education_requirement: Admitted to one of 266 notified top institutions
documents_required: Aadhaar, SC certificate, Income certificate, Admission letter, Marksheet, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC students in top professional institutions

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
name_hindi: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी योजना
description: Legal guarantee of 100 days of wage employment per financial year to rural households whose adult members are willing to do unskilled manual work.
benefits: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment; Wages at statutory minimum wage (Rs. 201-303/day by state); Unemployment allowance if work not provided
documents_required: Aadhaar, Job card (MGNREGS), Bank account, Residence proof
target_beneficiaries: Rural households willing to do manual work

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana — Shishu Loan
description: Collateral-free micro-enterprise loans for non-farm income generating activities under Shishu category (up to Rs. 50,000).
benefits: Loan up to Rs. 50,000 without collateral; Subsidized interest rate; MUDRA card for working capital
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN card, Business plan, Address proof, Bank account, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Micro-entrepreneurs with business up to Rs. 50,000 loan requirement

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana — Kishore Loan
description: MUDRA loan under Kishore category for micro/small enterprises requiring loan of Rs. 50,001 to Rs. 5 lakh.
benefits: Loan from Rs. 50,001 to Rs. 5 lakh; No collateral; MUDRA card; Working capital support
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN, Business registration/proof, 2-year ITR (if applicable), Bank statements, Address proof
target_beneficiaries: Small business owners needing Rs. 50,001–5 lakh

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana — Tarun Loan
description: MUDRA loan under Tarun category for established small enterprises requiring loan of Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh.
benefits: Loan from Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh; Competitive interest rates; No compulsory collateral
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN, Business proof, 2-year ITR, Bank statements, Business plan, Collateral documents (if available)
target_beneficiaries: Established small business owners needing Rs. 5–10 lakh

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Skill certification scheme providing free short-term skill training and monetary reward to youth.
benefits: Free skill training of 150-300 hours; Certificate recognized by industry; Average reward Rs. 8,000; Placement assistance
documents_required: Aadhaar, Educational certificate, Bank account, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Youth aged 15-45 seeking skill development

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy programme to generate employment through establishment of micro-enterprises in non-farm sector.
benefits: 25-35% subsidy on project cost in urban areas; 25-35% in rural areas (higher for SC/ST/Women/Ex-servicemen); Project cost up to Rs. 50 lakh (manufacturing), Rs. 20 lakh (service)
benefit_amount: 15 to 35 percent subsidy on project cost
education_requirement: Class 8 pass (for projects above Rs. 10 lakh)
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN, Educational certificate, Project report, Bank account, Passport photo, Caste certificate (if applicable)
target_beneficiaries: Aspiring entrepreneurs for micro-enterprise setup

name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Working capital loan scheme for street vendors to resume their livelihoods affected by COVID-19.
benefits: First loan Rs. 10,000; Second loan Rs. 20,000; Third loan Rs. 50,000; 7% interest subsidy; Digital transactions incentive Rs. 1200/year
documents_required: Aadhaar, Vending certificate/ID card issued by ULB, Bank account, Mobile number
target_beneficiaries: Urban street vendors

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between Rs. 10 lakh and Rs. 1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Loan Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 1 crore; Repayment tenure up to 7 years; Composite loan (term loan + working capital); Standup Mitra portal support
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN, Caste/gender certificate, Business plan, Bank account, Address proof
target_beneficiaries: SC/ST and women first-time entrepreneurs

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for unorganised sector workers providing guaranteed pension of Rs. 1000-5000 per month after age 60.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of Rs. 1000/2000/3000/4000/5000 per month after 60; Government co-contribution of 50% up to Rs. 1000/year for 5 years (for those not in income tax bracket)
income_limit_display: Not in income tax bracket for government co-contribution
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account (savings), Mobile number
target_beneficiaries: Unorganised sector workers aged 18-40

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय वृद्धावस्था पेंशन योजना
description: Monthly pension for destitute senior citizens aged 60 and above from BPL households.
benefits: Central contribution: Rs. 200/month (60-79 years); Rs. 500/month (80+ years); States add their own contribution
documents_required: Aadhaar, Age proof, BPL certificate, Bank account, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: BPL elderly aged 60+ years

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)
name_hindi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय विकलांगता पेंशन योजना
description: Monthly pension for persons with severe/multiple disabilities aged 18-79 years from BPL households.
benefits: Rs. 300/month central contribution; States add top-up; Total varies by state (usually Rs. 500-1000)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Disability certificate (80%+), BPL certificate, Bank account, Passport photo, Age proof
target_beneficiaries: BPL persons with severe disability aged 18-79

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Address declining child sex ratio and promote welfare and education of girl child; multi-sectoral programme.
benefits: Awareness programmes; Improved enrolment of girls in schools; Scholarships; No direct cash transfer
documents_required: Birth certificate, Aadhaar (parents)
target_beneficiaries: Girl children and their families

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: Small deposit scheme for girl children providing attractive interest rate and tax benefits to secure girl's education and marriage needs.
benefits: Interest rate 8.2% p.a. (one of highest in small savings); Tax exemption under Section 80C; Maturity at 21 years or marriage after 18
documents_required: Girl's birth certificate, Parent/guardian Aadhaar, Parent PAN, Address proof
deadline: Account must be opened before girl turns 10
target_beneficiaries: Girl children up to 10 years of age

name: One Stop Centre Scheme (Sakhi)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Integrated support services for women affected by violence — police, legal, medical, psychological counselling under one roof.
benefits: Emergency and non-emergency response; Medical assistance; Legal counselling; Police assistance; Temporary shelter up to 5 days; Psychological support
documents_required: No documents required for immediate help
target_beneficiaries: Women in distress / victims of violence

name: POSHAN Abhiyaan (National Nutrition Mission)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Mission to reduce malnutrition, stunting, under-nutrition and anaemia among children (0-6 years), adolescent girls, pregnant women and lactating mothers.
benefits: Supplementary nutrition; Growth monitoring; Behavioral change communication; Convergence of services at Anganwadi level
documents_required: Aadhaar, Ration card (for registration)
target_beneficiaries: Children 0-6 years, pregnant women, lactating mothers, adolescent girls

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Financial inclusion programme ensuring access to financial services — banking, remittance, credit, insurance, pension to excluded sections.
benefits: Zero-balance bank account; RuPay debit card; Accidental insurance Rs. 2 lakh; Overdraft facility up to Rs. 10,000
documents_required: Aadhaar, Passport photo (for some banks)
target_beneficiaries: All unbanked individuals

name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana (MKSY) — Gujarat
ministry: Agriculture & Cooperation Department, Government of Gujarat
description: Crop loss compensation to farmers not covered under PMFBY, for losses due to natural calamities — drought, unseasonal rainfall, floods.
benefits: Rs. 20,000/hectare for 33-60% crop loss; Rs. 25,000/hectare for >60% crop loss (up to 4 hectares)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land records (7/12 Utara), Bank account, Crop sowing declaration
target_beneficiaries: Farmers in Gujarat not covered under PMFBY

name: iKhedut Portal Subsidy Schemes — Gujarat
ministry: Agriculture & Cooperation Department, Government of Gujarat
description: Single portal for farmers to apply for multiple agricultural subsidies including irrigation equipment, farm machinery, seeds, fertilizers, and greenhouses.
benefits: 40-75% subsidy on drip irrigation; Tractor subsidy up to Rs. 45,000; Pump set subsidy; Seed subsidy; Poly house grant
documents_required: Aadhaar, 7/12 land records, Bank account, Caste certificate (if SC/ST), Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Farmers of Gujarat

name: Vahali Dikri Yojana — Gujarat
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Gujarat
description: Financial assistance to girl children for education and marriage in phases — at class 1, class 9, and age 18.
benefits: Rs. 4,000 on enrollment in class 1; Rs. 6,000 on admission to class 9; Rs. 1,00,000 on completing 18 years or higher education / marriage
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 2 lakh
documents_required: Birth certificate, Aadhaar (parents + child), Income certificate, School enrollment proof, Bank account in girl's name
target_beneficiaries: Girl children in Gujarat from families with income below Rs. 2 lakh

name: Manav Garima Yojana — Gujarat (SC)
ministry: Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat
description: Providing tool kits and equipment to SC artisans and self-employed persons for their traditional occupations.
benefits: Tool kit worth Rs. 42,000; Equipment for 28 types of occupations including tailoring, cobbling, carpentry, hawking
income_limit_display: Annual income up to Rs. 47,000 (rural) / Rs. 60,000 (urban)
documents_required: Aadhaar, SC caste certificate, Income certificate, Occupation proof, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC artisans with traditional occupations in Gujarat

name: Namo Shree Yojana — Gujarat
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Gujarat
description: Financial assistance to pregnant women for nutrition and health during pregnancy.
benefits: Rs. 12,000 financial assistance in 3 installments for pregnant women for their nutritional needs
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account, Pregnancy confirmation certificate from government doctor, MCP card
target_beneficiaries: Pregnant women in Gujarat

name: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana — Maharashtra
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
description: Monthly financial assistance to economically weak women for self-reliance and empowerment.
benefits: Rs. 1,500 per month direct benefit transfer to eligible women
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 2.5 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, Ration card, Income certificate, Domicile certificate, Bank account (in woman's name)
target_beneficiaries: Women aged 21-65 years in Maharashtra with family income below Rs. 2.5 lakh

name: Shasan Aplya Dari — Maharashtra
description: Mobile camp programme taking government services to citizens at their doorstep — 17+ services including health, income certificate, caste certificate.
benefits: Income certificate, caste certificate, health checkup, Aadhaar enrollment, crop damage survey — all at village level
documents_required: Aadhaar (basic identity)
target_beneficiaries: All citizens of Maharashtra (rural focus)

name: Namo Shetkari Maha Samman Nidhi — Maharashtra
description: Additional Rs. 6,000 per year income support to farmers registered under PM-KISAN in Maharashtra.
benefits: Rs. 6,000 per year (Rs. 2,000 per installment × 3) in addition to PM-KISAN benefit; Total Rs. 12,000/year with PM-KISAN
income_limit_display: No income limit (must be in PM-KISAN database)
documents_required: Aadhaar, PM-KISAN registration proof, Land records (7/12), Bank account
target_beneficiaries: PM-KISAN registered farmers of Maharashtra

name: Chief Minister's Breakfast Scheme — Tamil Nadu
description: Free breakfast for students of class 1-5 in government primary schools to improve school attendance and nutrition.
benefits: Free breakfast every school day; Nutritious meal with eggs, vegetables, and grains
income_limit_display: No income limit (available to all government school students)
documents_required: School enrollment
target_beneficiaries: Government primary school students in Tamil Nadu

name: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai Thittam — Tamil Nadu
ministry: Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu
description: Monthly financial assistance to women heads of household for their daily needs and empowerment.
benefits: Rs. 1,000 per month direct bank transfer to eligible women family heads
documents_required: Aadhaar, Ration card, Bank account, Family card
target_beneficiaries: Women family heads in Tamil Nadu

name: Tamil Nadu SC/ST Scholarship — Post-Matric
ministry: Adi Dravidar Welfare Department / BC Welfare Department, Tamil Nadu
description: State-funded scholarship for SC/ST students in post-matric education in Tamil Nadu, supplementing central schemes.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement; Maintenance allowance Rs. 250-700/month; Hostel stipend Rs. 500-900/month
benefit_amount: Full tuition + 250 to 700 per month maintenance
income_limit_display: Annual parental income up to Rs. 2.5 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, SC/ST certificate, Income certificate, Marksheet, Bonafide certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC/ST students in post-matric education in Tamil Nadu

name: UP Kisan Karj Rahat Yojana — Uttar Pradesh
name_hindi: उत्तर प्रदेश किसान कर्ज राहत योजना
description: One-time loan waiver for small and marginal farmers of Uttar Pradesh with outstanding crop loans up to Rs. 1 lakh.
benefits: Loan waiver up to Rs. 1 lakh per farmer; Covers short-term crop loans; Relief certificate issued
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land records (Khasra/Khatauni), Bank passbook showing loan, Ration card
target_beneficiaries: Small/marginal farmers of UP with outstanding crop loan up to Rs. 1 lakh

name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana — Uttar Pradesh
description: Financial assistance to girl children in 6 phases from birth to post-graduation to promote girls' education and health in UP.
benefits: Rs. 2000 at birth; Rs. 1000 at vaccination; Rs. 2000 at class 1; Rs. 2000 at class 6; Rs. 3000 at class 9; Rs. 5000 at graduation/diploma
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 3 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar (parents + child), Income certificate, Birth certificate, School enrollment, Bank account in girl's name
deadline: Apply within 6 months of eligibility event
target_beneficiaries: Girl children in UP from families with income below Rs. 3 lakh (max 2 girls per family)

name: Vridhavastha Samman Pension Yojana — Uttar Pradesh
description: Monthly pension for BPL senior citizens above 60 years in Uttar Pradesh.
benefits: Rs. 1000 per month (Rs. 800 state + Rs. 200 central IGNOAPS) direct bank transfer
income_limit_display: BPL/no income limit (rural: no land over 2 hectares)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Age proof (voter ID/birth cert), BPL card/Ration card, Bank account, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: BPL elderly above 60 years in Uttar Pradesh

name: Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana — Rajasthan
ministry: Medical Health and Family Welfare Department, Rajasthan
description: Universal health insurance for all families of Rajasthan providing cashless treatment at government and empanelled private hospitals.
benefits: Cashless health insurance coverage of Rs. 25 lakh per family per year; 1,576+ medical packages; Pre and post hospitalization expenses covered
income_limit_display: No income limit (universal; BPL free, others Rs. 850/year premium)
is_bpl_required: No (free for BPL/SECC; nominal premium for others)
documents_required: Jan Aadhaar card, Aadhaar, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: All families of Rajasthan

name: Annapurna Food Packet Yojana — Rajasthan
ministry: Food and Civil Supplies Department, Rajasthan
description: Free food packet containing pulses, cooking oil, salt, spices to NFSA beneficiaries at ration shops.
benefits: Free monthly food packet with 1 kg chana, 1 kg sugar, 100ml cooking oil, spices; Available at PDS shops
documents_required: Ration card (NFSA), Aadhaar
target_beneficiaries: NFSA cardholders in Rajasthan

name: Lakshmir Bhandar — West Bengal
ministry: Women and Child Development & Social Welfare Department, West Bengal
description: Monthly financial assistance to women heads of household to support basic household needs.
benefits: Rs. 1000/month for SC/ST women; Rs. 500/month for general category women; Direct bank transfer
income_limit_display: No income limit (excluding government employees/income tax payers)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account, Swasthya Sathi card / ration card, Savings account in bank
target_beneficiaries: Women family heads in West Bengal aged 25-60

name: Kanyashree Prakalpa — West Bengal
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, West Bengal
description: Conditional cash transfer scheme to improve the wellbeing of girls and prevent child marriage by keeping them in school.
benefits: K1: Annual scholarship Rs. 1000 (age 13-18, class 8-12); K2: One-time grant Rs. 25,000 on turning 18 if unmarried and in education/training
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 1.2 lakh
education_requirement: Enrolled in class 8-12 (K1); 18+ unmarried enrolled in education (K2)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Age proof, Income certificate, School enrollment certificate, Bank account in girl's name
target_beneficiaries: Girls aged 13-18 from families with income below Rs. 1.2 lakh in West Bengal

name: Gruha Lakshmi Scheme — Karnataka
ministry: Women and Child Welfare Department, Karnataka
description: Monthly financial support to women heads of BPL/AAY households in Karnataka.
benefits: Rs. 2,000 per month per household to the woman head of family
documents_required: Aadhaar, BPL/AAY ration card, Bank account in woman's name
target_beneficiaries: Women family heads with BPL/AAY ration card in Karnataka

name: Yuva Nidhi Scheme — Karnataka
ministry: Department of Skill Development Entrepreneurship and Livelihood, Karnataka
description: Unemployment allowance to fresh graduates and diploma holders who are unable to find employment within 6 months of passing.
benefits: Rs. 3000/month for degree holders; Rs. 1500/month for diploma holders; For 2 years or until employment
benefit_amount: 1500 to 3000 per month for up to 2 years
income_limit_display: Family income — not income tax payer
education_requirement: Degree/Diploma from recognized Karnataka institution passed in 2023 or later
documents_required: Aadhaar, Degree/Diploma certificate, Marksheet, Bank account, Domicile certificate
target_beneficiaries: Unemployed degree/diploma holders aged 18-25 in Karnataka

name: Mukhyamantri Ladli Behna Yojana — Madhya Pradesh
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Madhya Pradesh
description: Monthly financial assistance to married women of MP for economic empowerment and household needs.
benefits: Rs. 1,250 per month direct bank transfer; Enhanced to Rs. 3,000/month in phases
income_limit_display: Annual family income up to Rs. 2.5 lakh; no government employee in family
documents_required: Aadhaar, Samagra ID, Bank account in woman's name, Ration card
target_beneficiaries: Married/widowed/divorced women aged 23-60 in MP with family income below Rs. 2.5 lakh

name: Jagananna Gorumudda — Andhra Pradesh
description: Nutritious mid-day meal (including eggs) for students in government schools to improve health and attendance.
benefits: Free mid-day meal with eggs (4 days/week); Rs. 3 per egg provided by government; Nutritional supplements
education_requirement: Enrolled in AP government school class 1-10
documents_required: School enrollment
target_beneficiaries: All government school students in AP

name: YSR Housing Scheme (Pedalandariki Illu) — Andhra Pradesh
description: Construction of houses for homeless poor families in AP with free house site and construction assistance.
benefits: Free house site (1.5 cents urban, 2.5 cents rural); Construction assistance Rs. 1.80 lakh for new house
documents_required: Aadhaar, Ration card, BPL certificate, No property certificate, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Houseless BPL families in Andhra Pradesh

name: Telangana Rythu Bandhu Scheme
description: Investment support to farmers of Telangana per acre per season for agricultural input costs.
benefits: Rs. 10,000 per acre per year (Rs. 5,000 per season — Kharif and Rabi); Paid before each crop season
documents_required: Aadhaar, Land records (Pahani/Passbook), Bank account linked to Aadhaar
target_beneficiaries: All farmers with registered land in Telangana

name: Karunya Health Scheme — Kerala
ministry: Health and Family Welfare Department, Kerala
description: Financial assistance for the treatment of critical illnesses for BPL families not covered under other schemes.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs. 2 lakh per year per family for critical illness treatment at government/empanelled hospitals
documents_required: Aadhaar, Karunya card / ration card, BPL certificate, Medical documents
target_beneficiaries: BPL families in Kerala requiring critical illness treatment

name: Aam Aadmi Clinic — Punjab
ministry: Health and Family Welfare Department, Punjab
description: Free primary healthcare including 100+ medicines and 36 diagnostic tests at Aam Aadmi Clinics across Punjab.
benefits: Free OPD consultation; 100+ free medicines; 36 free diagnostic tests; Referral services
documents_required: Aadhaar (optional for basic services)
target_beneficiaries: All residents of Punjab

name: National Food Security Act — PDS (Ration Card)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Subsidized food grains to up to 75% rural and 50% urban population under NFSA; AAY and PHH categories.
benefits: 5 kg food grains/person/month at Re. 1/kg (millet), Rs. 2/kg (wheat), Rs. 3/kg (rice); AAY families get 35 kg/month
benefit_amount: 5 kg subsidized foodgrain per person per month
income_limit_display: BPL/PHH/AAY as identified by state government
documents_required: Aadhaar, Income/residence proof, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: 75% rural and 50% urban population under NFSA

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: 5 kg free food grains per person per month to NFSA beneficiaries (over and above normal NFSA entitlement).
benefits: Additional 5 kg free food grains/month per NFSA member; Covers all 81.35 crore NFSA beneficiaries
benefit_amount: 5 kg free foodgrain per person per month
documents_required: Ration card (NFSA), Aadhaar
target_beneficiaries: All NFSA cardholders (81.35 crore people)

name: Startup India Scheme
description: Government programme to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups in India.
benefits: DPIIT recognition certificate; 3-year income tax exemption; Self-certification for 9 labour and environmental laws; Fund of Funds (Rs. 10,000 crore); IP fast-tracking
benefit_amount: Tax exemption 3 years + access to 10000 crore fund
income_limit_display: No income limit; startup turnover below Rs. 100 crore
documents_required: PAN, Aadhaar, Company incorporation certificate, DPIIT registration, Business plan
target_beneficiaries: Innovative startups working in technology, social impact, or new business models

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Placement-linked skill training programme for rural youth in the age group 15-35 years.
benefits: Free residential/non-residential skill training; 70%+ placement guarantee; Post-placement support Rs. 1000-1500/month for 2 years; Foreign placement for select candidates
benefit_amount: Free training + 1000 to 1500 per month post-placement support
documents_required: Aadhaar, Educational certificate, Bank account, Passport photo, MGNREGS job card (if available)
target_beneficiaries: Rural youth aged 15-35

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Recognition, upskilling, and credit support to artisans and craftsmen in 18 traditional trades including carpenter, blacksmith, cobbler, potter, tailor, barber.
benefits: PM Vishwakarma certificate and ID card; Skill training with Rs. 500/day stipend; Toolkit incentive Rs. 15,000; Collateral-free loan Rs. 1 lakh (1st tranche) + Rs. 2 lakh (2nd); 5% concessional interest
caste_category: All (OBC communities traditionally in these trades)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Bank account, Trade occupation proof, Mobile number linked to Aadhaar, Passport photo
target_beneficiaries: Artisans and craftsmen in 18 traditional trades

name: UGC Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship for SC/ST
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs
description: Fellowship for SC/ST students pursuing MPhil and PhD to cover all non-NET fellowship requirements.
benefits: JRF: Rs. 31,000/month (first 2 years); SRF: Rs. 35,000/month (remaining); Contingency Rs. 10,000-20,500/year; HRA as applicable
documents_required: Aadhaar, SC/ST certificate, Post-graduation marksheet, University registration letter, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: SC/ST students pursuing MPhil/PhD

name: PM Awas Yojana 2.0 (Urban) — Extended
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Extension and enhancement of PMAY-Urban to cover additional urban poor households with updated eligibility and enhanced benefits.
benefits: Central assistance up to Rs. 2.5 lakh for BLC; CLSS subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG/MIG; Technology Innovation Grant
income_limit_display: EWS: up to Rs. 3 lakh; LIG: Rs. 3-6 lakh; MIG: Rs. 6-18 lakh
documents_required: Aadhaar, PAN, Income certificate, Self-declaration of no pucca house, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Urban households without pucca house in EWS/LIG/MIG categories

name: Agnipath Scheme — Agniveer
description: Short-term (4-year) military service scheme for youth in the three defence services (Army, Navy, Air Force).
benefits: Monthly package Rs. 30,000-40,000; Non-contributory life insurance Rs. 48 lakh; Seva Nidhi of Rs. 11.71 lakh on exit; 25% retention for permanent commission
gender: All (women in Air Force and Navy)
documents_required: Aadhaar, Class 10/12 certificate, Medical fitness certificate, Police verification, Bank account
target_beneficiaries: Youth aged 17-23 for military service
